data.chapter_title_en: Words of remembrance for morning and evening
data.arabic_text: ((رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبَّاً، وَبِالْإِسْلاَمِ دِيناً، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ صلى الله عليه وسلم نَبِيّاً)) (ثلاثَ مرَّاتٍ).
data.english_text: (I am pleased with Allah as a Lord, and Islam as a religion and Muhammad  as a Prophet.’(three times))

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Radeetu billahi rabban wabil-islami deenan wabiMuhammadin  nabiyya. (three times))
